task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Q1 2024 Product Roadmap' tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q1 2024 Product Roadmap' tiddler is visible in the main content area.
The tiddler is in edit mode with the title field editable.

task_completion.description: Change the title from 'Q1 2024 Product Roadmap' to 'Q1 2024 Engineering Roadmap'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field shows 'Q1 2024 Engineering Roadmap' instead of the original 'Q1 2024 Product Roadmap'.
The tiddler is displayed in view mode with the new title 'Q1 2024 Engineering Roadmap'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the old tiddler name no longer exists
task_completion.visual_evidence: Searching for 'Product Roadmap' returns no results, or the sidebar no longer shows the old tiddler name.

task_completion.description: Verify tags are preserved after rename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The renamed tiddler still shows its original tags: 'Project Management', 'Roadmap', and 'Q1 2024'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the TiddlyWiki web interface in Firefox.

integrity.description: Verify the tiddler content was not modified during rename
integrity.visual_evidence: The roadmap content with milestones and deliverables remains intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task renames 'Q1 2024 Product Roadmap' to 'Q1 2024 Engineering Roadmap'. Only 'Product' changes to 'Engineering' in the title. Tags and content must be preserved.
